2604.11261.title: Inspectable AI for Science: A Research Object Approach to Generative AI Governance
2604.11261.paper_summary: This paper introduces AI as a Research Object (AI-RO), a paradigm for governing the use of generative AI in scientific research. Instead of debating whether AI is an author or merely a tool, we propose treating AI interactions as structured, inspectable components of the research process. Under this view, the legitimacy of an AI-assisted scientific paper depends on how model use is integrated into the workflow, documented, and made accountable. Drawing on Research Object theory and FAIR principles, we propose a framework for recording model configuration, prompts, and outputs through interaction logs and metadata packaging. These properties are particularly consequential in security and privacy (S&P) research, where provenance artifacts must satisfy confidentiality constraints, integrity guarantees, and auditability requirements that generic disclosure practices do not address. We implement a lightweight writing pipeline in which a language model synthesizes human-authored structured literature review notes under explicit constraints and produces a verifiable provenance record. We present this work as a position supported by an initial demonstrative workflow, arguing that governance of generative AI in science can be implemented as structured documentation, controlled disclosure, and integrity-preserving provenance capture. Based on this example, we outline and motivate a set of necessary future developments required to make such practices practical and widely adoptable.
2604.11261.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文介紹了將人工智慧視為研究對象（AI-RO），這是一種管理生成性人工智慧在科學研究中使用的範式。<lb/>我們提出將人工智慧的互動視為研究過程中結構化、可檢查的組件，而不是辯論人工智慧是否為作者或僅僅是一個工具。<lb/>在這種觀點下，人工智慧輔助的科學論文的合法性取決於模型使用如何融入工作流程、被記錄和負責。<lb/>基於研究對象理論和公平原則，我們提出了一個框架，用於通過互動日誌和元數據包裝來記錄模型配置、提示和輸出。<lb/>這些特性在安全與隱私（S&P）研究中尤其重要，因為來源文檔必須滿足保密約束、完整性保證和可審計性要求，而這些要求是一般披露實踐所無法解決的。<lb/>我們實現了一個輕量級的寫作管道，其中一個語言模型在明確的約束下綜合人類撰寫的結構化文獻綜述筆記，並生成可驗證的來源記錄。<lb/>我們將這項工作呈現為一個立場，支持一個初步的示範工作流程，主張生成性人工智慧在科學中的治理可以通過結構化文檔、受控披露和完整性保護的來源捕獲來實施。<lb/>基於這個例子，我們概述並激勵了一系列必要的未來發展，以使這些實踐變得可行並廣泛採用。
2604.11261.author: Ruta Binkyte et.al.
2604.11261.authors: Ruta Binkyte, Sharif Abuaddba, Chamikara Mahawaga, Ming Ding, Natasha Fernandes, Mario Fritz
